feedback.text: There used to be a game which I loved playing, called Battlefield Play 4 Free. The game was free to install and play, but many weapons,suits and accessories had to be bought with real many, which I did. 3 Years later the game was shut down (servers shutdown). This is not fair. I put my money in it, and they shutdown the whole thing. Hundreds of euros wasted. I wish there was a way to 'self host' the server after the official shutdown, so that I could at least play it locally (lan party) with my friends. Another game I loved was Need for Speed World. It was also 'free' to play. But many cars, tweaks and customizations could only be bought with real money. The game eventually also shut down ... once again hundreds of euros gone. Since the game was popular, many tried reverse-engeneering the api based on the client requests. ... Please just allows as to self-host these servers, at the very least.
